task_completion.description: Navigate to the Inventory app settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Inventory application is open and the Settings page is visible.

task_completion.description: Enable Multi-Step Routes in the settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Multi-Step Routes' checkbox in the Inventory settings is checked/enabled.

task_completion.description: Open the configuration page for the main warehouse
task_completion.visual_evidence: The warehouse configuration form is open for the main warehouse (look for Short Name / Code 'WH').

task_completion.description: Set incoming shipments to a 3-step process
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the Warehouse Configuration tab, the 'Incoming Shipments' option is set to the 3-step process (Receive goods in input, then quality and then stock).

task_completion.description: Set outgoing shipments to a 3-step process
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the Warehouse Configuration tab, the 'Outgoing Shipments' option is set to the 3-step process (Pack goods, send goods in output and then deliver / Pick, Pack, and Ship).

integrity.description: Agent used the Odoo web GUI to configure the settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Odoo interface, rather than terminal windows executing Python scripts or API calls.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Odoo application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows a valid local Odoo URL (e.g., localhost:8069) and the standard Odoo interface is present.

integrity.description: Agent actually saved the configuration rather than just selecting options
integrity.visual_evidence: The warehouse configuration form shows as saved (e.g., no 'Unsaved changes' indicator, or the Save button was clicked and the form is in a read-only/saved state).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target warehouse code is 'WH'. The expected configuration for delivery steps is the 3-step process ('pick_pack_ship' / Pick, Pack, Ship), and reception steps is the 3-step process ('three_steps' / Receive, Quality, Stock). Note that in Odoo, 'Multi-Step Routes' must be enabled in Inventory Settings before these warehouse-specific route options become visible.
